item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Turkey meatballs in a mild and creamy curry sauce with warm spices, served withrice, also available as brown rice and gluten free, topped with fresh coconutfruit salad and parsley. Lime on the side (1+2+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Coq au vin, a French classic with chicken braised in a rich red wine sauce withvegetables, served with creamy mashed potatoes and topped with fresh parsley.Green salad and mustard vinaigrette on the side (6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Halloumi au vin, golden seared halloumi in an aromatic red wine sauce withvegetables, served with creamy mashed potatoes and parsley. Green salad andmustard vinaigrette on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Braised pork neck, tender and rich, served with braised leeks in mustard,tarragon and parmesan (6+11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Braised tofu with deep flavour, served with leeks in mustard, tarragon andparmesan (11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Butter chicken, mør kylling i cremet tomat og kryddersauce med varme aromatiskenoter, serveret med jasminris og friske urter (6+13+15) GREEN DISH: ret Butter blomkål med kikærter i cremet kryddersauce, serveret med jasminris ogfriske urter

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Sprødstegt tonkatsu, panko paneret svinekotelet, også som glutenfri, serveretmed ris, også som brune ris, og tonkatsusauce med grøntsager. Toppet medvegansk furikake. Hertil nordisk karashi og japanske syltede grøntsager a part (1+2+7+8+11+13) GREEN DISH: ret Sprødstegt panko paneret portobello, også som glutenfri, serveret med ris ogtonkatsusauce med grøntsager, toppet med vegansk furikake. Hertil karashi ogsyltede grøntsager a part
